---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: 
    - projects.yml
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
---

Welcome to my project portfolio. Here you will find work completed as part of the **E-Portfolio and Business Analytics** module, showcasing data analysis and visualisation using Python.
